Finding ID: SEC-001
Specialist: Security Auditor
Severity: Critical
Confidence: High
File: src/auth/login.py
Lines: 42-58
Title: SQL injection in user search endpoint
Evidence: The search_users function at line 45 concatenates user input directly into a SQL query string.
Impact chain: User input flows into SQL → SQL injection → full database access
Recommended fix: Use parameterized queries.

Finding ID: SEC-002
Specialist: Security Auditor
Severity: Important
Confidence: Medium
File: src/auth/login.py
Lines: 45-52
Title: Hardcoded credentials in authentication module
Evidence: The login function contains a hardcoded password check on line 48.
Impact chain: Hardcoded creds discovered → authentication bypass → unauthorized access
Recommended fix: Remove the hardcoded credential check.
